text.title: Linear Agent Integration and Gotchas
text.summary: Agent-driven issue creation from SDD tasks, GraphQL pagination, cycle ID resolution, webhook security, and recommended subagents.

section.title: SDD to Issues Pipeline

rule.statement: Convert SDD implementation-plan.md TASK_ blocks to Linear issues: map task complexity (Low → NoPriority=0, Medium → Medium=3, High → High=2, Critical → Urgent=1); validate acceptance criteria non-empty before calling issueCreate mutation.
rule.rationale: Linear's issueCreate mutation does not validate acceptance criteria completeness; the agent must enforce this before calling the API, otherwise issues enter the backlog without enough information for developers.

section.reference: Prompt for converting SDD task blocks to Linear issue payloads

rule.statement: Implement cursor-based pagination for all issues queries; Linear GraphQL returns max 250 items per page by default. Pass after: cursor argument with endCursor from previous response until hasNextPage is false.
rule.rationale: Agents that fetch only the first page silently miss issues beyond the page size; partial results produce incorrect velocity counts and incomplete blockers lists.

rule.statement: Always resolve the active cycle by querying team.activeCycle at runtime; never hardcode a cycle ID in agent configuration or prompts.
rule.rationale: Cycle IDs rotate every 2 weeks; hardcoded IDs break silently after the cycle advances, causing all cycle-assignment mutations to fail without an obvious error.

rule.statement: Verify Linear webhook HMAC signature on every incoming request; reject requests without valid signatures — an agent endpoint without HMAC validation is an injection vector.
rule.rationale: Linear sends webhooks with an X-Linear-Signature header containing an HMAC-SHA256 signature; without validation any caller can inject fake events into the agent pipeline.

section.title: Issue Creation Script
section.reference: Bash script to create a Linear issue via GraphQL mutation

list.item: faion-sdd-executor-agent: converts SDD task blocks into Linear issue drafts, validates acceptance criteria completeness before API submission.
linear-cycle-hygiene: nightly; detects issues in "In Progress" for more than 3 cycle days with no comments; posts Slack digest of stalled issues.
linear-release-reporter: queries project issues for a release, posts milestone completion percentage as a cycle summary comment.
